selectedSlice: Add requirement-backed context and existing requirement-detail actions to student Uploaded and linked work rows.
selectionReason: Current repo evidence showed a real student workflow gap, not speculative polish. The student files list already rendered real download and external-link actions, but it still lacked the requirement context already available elsewhere in /api/student/dashboard, so students had to hunt through the checklist to confirm where each file belonged. Reusing the current requirement-detail action kept the slice small, student-scoped, and route-free while turning a passive file list into a real drill-down.
userFacingImprovement: Students can now see which requirement each uploaded or linked item supports and can reopen the matching in-page requirement detail directly from the files list.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The slice changes only student-scoped dashboard payload and student workspace rendering for the current signed-in student.
No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor-assignment, or student-privacy boundary changed.
No new routes, broader evidence downloads, or storage-identifier exposure were introduced.
Existing download and external-link actions stay unchanged while the files list gains requirement context.

validation.notes: Focused student dashboard and workspace coverage passed before docs/state closeout, the audit regression test was refreshed for the new completed-row count, and the broader validation ladder passed after the closeout files were updated. git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

deferred: Filtered Audit cross-school proof still needs a tighter locally provable scenario before another audit-focused pass.
Student evidence-panel language cleanup beyond this requirement handoff remains open.
Student next-step anchor follow-through is broader than this one files-list slice.
Broader Global Admin route refresh remains larger than one safe hourly slice.
Site selector follow-through still needs a broader cross-surface contract.
Mentor reassignment and removal workflow still needs mutation and audit design.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed runtime and audit-event writes.
Admin import approved-path copy refresh remains lower value than improving an existing student workflow.
nextRecommended: Continue the student refresh only where the current dashboard can prove another exact in-page evidence, submission, or feedback handoff; otherwise return to filtered Audit cross-school proof only if a tighter local scenario is now provable.
doNotRepeat: Do not strip requirementId or requirementTitle from /api/student/dashboard evidence rows while Uploaded and linked work reuses them for exact requirement reopen.
Do not regress Uploaded and linked work back to passive file history while the existing requirement detail already supports the same student-scoped handoff.
Do not expose storage identifiers, new evidence routes, or other-student file context while deepening student file usability.
